features.name: conditional macro definition causing conflicting function signatures
features.description: Code should include preprocessor conditional macros that generate functions with the same name but different return types (void vs coroutine), causing linker multiple definition errors

features.name: ifdef controlled signal definitions with internal function generation
features.description: Code should include `ifdef preprocessor blocks that conditionally define signals or logic in ways that cause Verilator to generate duplicate internal function definitions with incompatible types
